context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the review-migration instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when schema changes must be safe in real environments.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Core principle:** Prefer phased rollouts over one-shot migrations on large or busy tables.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Check lock behavior for indexes, constraints, defaults, and rewrites.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use multi-step rollouts for renames, type changes, and unique constraints.
